smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 191159Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 496/26. BERING SEA. ALASKA. 1. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 30 NOV BY CABLESHIP IT INFINITY ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 58-41.85N 157-20.77W, 58-24.79N 157-47.71W, 58-08.90N 158-43.85W, 58-12.85N 161-01.19W, 58-15.70N 161-48.97W, 58-58.32N 164-39.72W, 60-14.14N 165-20.64W, 60-53.89N 166-39.24W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 494/26. 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 010001Z DEC 26.

141948Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 495/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 241400Z TO 241825Z JUL, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1825Z DAILY 25 THRU 30 JUL IN AREA BOUND BY 34-29.00N 120-29.00W, 34-40.00N 120-37.00W, 34-38.00N 120-42.00W, 33-49.00N 120-55.00W, 29-13.00N 121-56.00W, 29-13.00N 121-36.00W. B. 241400Z TO 241843Z JUL, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1843Z DAILY 25 THRU 30 JUL IN AREA BOUND BY 29-13.00N 121-31.00W, 29-13.00N 122-03.00W, 28-49.00N 122-14.00W, 27-41.00N 122-06.00W, 28-42.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 301943Z JUL 26.

172030Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 493/261. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 280200Z TO 280625Z JUL, ALTERNATE 0200Z TO 0625Z DAILY 29 JUL THRU 03 AUG IN AREAS BOUND BY: 34-29.00N 120-29.00W, 34-40.00N 120-37.00W, 34-38.00N 120-42.00W, 33-49.00N 120-55.00W, 29-13.00N 121-56.00W, 29-13.00N 121-36.00W. B. 280200Z TO 280643Z JUL, ALTERNATE 0200Z TO 0643Z DAILY 29 JUL THRU 03 AUG 29-13.00N 121-31.00W, 29-13.00N 122-03.00W, 28-49.00N 122-14.00W, 27-41.00N 122-06.00W, 28-42.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 030743Z AUG 26.

171653Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 490/26. 1. NAVAREA XII WARNINGS IN FORCE AS OF 171653Z JUL. ALL THE INFORCE WARNINGS ARE LISTED HERE. 489/2026, 487/2026, 486/2026, 485/2026, 482/2026, 481/2026, 480/2026, 479/2026, 476/2026, 473/2026, 469/2026, 467/2026, 458/2026, 448/2026, 447/2026, 446/2026, 429/2026, 426/2026, 98/2026. 718/2025, 678/2025, 422/2025, 392/2025, 354/2025, 344/2025, 338/2025, 259/2025, 208/2025. 862/2024, 441/2024. 93/2023. 721/2022, 720/2022, 244/2022, 243/2022. 2. THE COMPLETE TEXT OF ALL IN-FORCE NAVAREA XII BROADCAST WARNINGS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE NGA MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION WEBSITE AT: MSI.NGA.MIL/NAVWARNINGS. ALTERNATIVELY, THESE MAY BE REQUESTED BY E-MAIL FROM THE NAVAREA XII COORDINATOR AT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL. 3. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 475/26.

162213Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 486/26. NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY HONOLULU 21-22.00N 158-09.00W TRANSMIT SERVICES UNRELIABLE. 2. HONOLULU BROADCASTS WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY GUAM 13-25.00N 144-50.00E. 3. DSC RESPONSES WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY POINT REYES 37-56.00N 122-44.00W. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 276/26.

161946Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 485/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1600Z TO 0100Z DAILY 21 AND 23 JUL, ALTERNATE 241300Z TO 250001Z JUL IN AREA BOUND BY 33-59.17N 119-29.77W, 33-37.78N 119-10.05W, 33-15.60N 119-38.17W, 32-46.60N 120-27.42W, 33-08.75N 120-44.98W, 33-36.93N 120-22.28W, 33-53.43N 119-50.77W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 250101Z JUL 26.

121846Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 481/26 GULF OF PANAMA. PANAMA. ONE MISSING PERSON IN 08-29.12N 079-40.05W. AS OF 121837Z JUL. SEARCH AND RESCUE OPERATIONS IN VICINITY 08-29.12N 079-40.05W. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO RCC PANAMA, EMAIL: GUERINIJA@GMAIL.COM.

030020Z JUL 26 NAVAREA XII 469/26. NORTH PACIFIC. BROADCAST AND COMMUNICATION SERVICES UNRELIABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES 37-55.00N 122-24.00W. B. HONOLULU 21-22.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. NOME 64-29.00N 165-15.00W. E. COLD BAY 55-11.00N 162-42.00W. F. ST PAUL 57-09.00N 170-14.00W. G. SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E. H. PT HIGGINS 55-27.00N 131-49.00W. I. ASTORIA 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. J. BERING SEA 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. K. CAMBRIA 33-44N 118-24W.
291810Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 458/26. BERING SEA. ALASKA. USCG COMMUNICATION FACILITY ST PAUL 57-09.00N 170-14.00W HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES OFF AIR.

232121Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 447/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z JUL TO 010800Z AUG IN AREA BOUND BY 32-55.00N 118-25.00W, 32-55.00N 118-15.00W, 32-40.00N 118-15.00W, 32-40.00N 118-35.00W, 32-45.00N 118-35.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z AUG 26.

232118Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 446/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z JUL TO 010800Z AUG IN AREA BOUND BY 32-33.00N 118-25.00W, 32-35.00N 118-16.00W, 32-35.00N 117-40.00W, 31-55.00N 117-40.00W, 31-55.00N 118-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z AUG 26.
162018Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 429/26. NORTH PACIFIC. ALASKA. USCG COMMUNICATION FACILITY PT HIGGINS 55-27.00N 131-49.00W TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES OFF AIR.
151250Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 426/26. NORTH PACIFIC. PANAMA. COSTA RICA. 1. DANGEROUS WRECK IN 08-36.66N 083-08.95W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 290001Z JUL 26.
171634Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 98/26(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES INOPERATIVE.
132105Z NOV 25 NAVAREA XII 718/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. 1. WEATHER FAX SERVICES OFF AIR AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 460/24.
141418Z JUL 25 NAVAREA XII 422/25(16). BERING STRAIT. ALASKA. SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS, AT DEPTH 15 METERS, ESTABLISHED IN: A. 65-46.86N 168-34.07W. B. 65-44.76N 168-15.75W.

242359Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 392/25(16). NORTH PACIFIC. M/V MORNING MIDAS SANK IN 45-16.88N 179-14.13W. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION AND REPORT PRESENCE OF OIL SHEENS OR DEBRIS TO USCG SECTOR WESTERN ALASKA AND US ARCTIC, PHONE: 907 428 4100, E-MAIL: SOUTHWESTERNAK@USCG.MIL.

130011Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 354/25(GEN). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MESSAGING SERVICES UNRELIABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES (C) 37-55.50N 122-43.90W. B. HONOLULU (O) 21-26.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. E. CAMBRIA (Q) 33-44.00N 118-24.00W.
100619Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 344/25(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. COMMDET KODIAK, AK REMOTE SITE SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF R/T SERVICES OFF AIR.
071202Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 338/25(18). OREGON. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W OFF AIR.
051901Z MAY 25 NAVAREA XII 259/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W HF AND DSC SERVICES UNRELIABLE.
061220Z APR 25 NAVAREA XII 208/25(22). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. COLOMBIA. PUNTA SOLDADO LIGHT 03-48.50N 077-10.80W DISCONTINUED.

281257Z OCT 24 NAVAREA XII 862/24(83). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. KIRIBATI. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE IN VICINITY OF TRACKLINE JOINING 02-01.46N 157-29.67W, 02-01.45N 157-29.69W, 02-01.45N 157-29.72W, 02-01.42N 157-29.82W, 02-01.36N 157-30.04W, 02-01.22N 157-30.29W, 02-00.20N 157-32.23W. 100 METER BERTH REQUESTED.
182355Z JUN 24 NAVAREA XII 441/24(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. MORRO SANTO DOMINGO LIGHT 28-14.37N 114-06.18W UNLIT.

282248Z FEB 23 NAVAREA XII 93/23(19). NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. INTERMITTENT MISSILE FIRING OPERATIONS CONDUCTED BY THE PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE FACILITY (PMRF), BARKING SANDS, KAUAI, HAWAII, IN WHISKEY 188 (W-188) OPERATING AREA. OPERATIONS ARE CONDUCTED PERIODICALLY THROUGHOUT EACH WEEK IN AREA BOUND BY 22-00.0N 159-51.0W, 22-00.0N 160-00.0W, 22-04.0N 160-06.0W, 21-59.5N 160-21.0W, 22-05.0N 161-35.0W, 22-45.0N 161-25.0W, 22-56.0N 161-49.0W, 23-34.0N 161-18.6W, 23-57.0N 160-41.0W, 25-41.0N 161-36.0W, 26-00.0N 159-58.0W, 25-47.0N 158-15.0W, 23-54.0N 158-15.0W, 22-20.0N 159-09.0W, 22-21.0N 159-30.0W, 22-13.0N 159-42.0W, 22-00.0N 159-51.0W. 2. VESSELS MAY BE REQUESTED TO ALTER COURSE DUE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AND ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT "PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE BARKING SANDS" ON VHF MARINE BAND CHANNEL 16 PRIOR TO ENTERING THE ABOVE BOUNDARIES. IF UNABLE TO CONTACT PMRF PRIOR TO ENTERING OR WHILE IN THE WARNING AREA, RELAY MESSAGES THROUGH U.S. COAST GUARD HONOLULU. 3. VESSELS INBOUND AND OUTBOUND FOR HAWAIIAN PORTS WILL CREATE THE LEAST INTERFERENCE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AS WELL AS ENHANCE VESSEL SAFETY BY PASSING SOUTH OF THE ISLANDS OF KAUAI AND NIIHAU DURING SPECIFIED TIMES. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 269/21.
272221Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 721/22(21). EL SALVADOR. CHART 21524 MOORING BUOYS 13-35.23N 089-51.10W UNLIT.
272211Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 720/22(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. EL SALVADOR. CHART 12529. PUERTO DE LA UNION 16 BUOY 13-20.36N 087-48.99W UNLIT.

MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ NAVAREA XII 243/22(18). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. CHART 18740. 1. CORONADO ISLAND SOUTH LIGHT 32-23.5N 117-14.5W UNLIT. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 159/21.
